archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Dark Mode (Linear & Obsidian style)

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing on landing page (p-12 to p-24). Tight control-room spacing in app (p-4 to p-6).
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-md (6px) or rounded-lg (8px) for premium feel, never fully rounded except for icon buttons/pills.
spacing_and_layout.app_layout: Sidebar on left (w-64, border-r border-zinc-800). Main content area takes remaining width. Chat messages constrained to max-w-3xl for readability.

components.cards: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-6 hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors
components.buttons_primary: bg-white text-black font-medium rounded-md px-4 py-2 hover:bg-zinc-200 transition-colors
components.buttons_secondary: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-800 rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-colors
components.inputs: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-3 text-zinc-100 placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus:border-zinc-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-600 outline-none w-full
components.citations: inline-flex items-center px-1.5 py-0.5 mx-1 rounded text-xs font-mono bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 border border-zinc-700 hover:border-zinc-500 cursor-pointer transition-colors align-middle
components.dropzone: border-2 border-dashed border-zinc-800 rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-zinc-400 hover:border-zinc-600 hover:bg-zinc-900/50 transition-all cursor-pointer
components.chat_message_user: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg p-4 ml-auto max-w-[80%] text-zinc-100
components.chat_message_ai: bg-transparent p-4 mr-auto max-w-3xl prose prose-invert text-zinc-300
components.confidence_badge: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800

landing.hero: Dark abstract background with subtle grid or noise. Massive H1, punchy subheadline, primary CTA to enter app. Overlay max bg-black/50 to ensure text legibility.
landing.features: Bento grid with 3 main features (Agentic RAG, Inline Citations, Multi-Paper Synthesis) using card styling.

library.layout: Top area contains the drag-and-drop upload dropzone (max 10 papers). Below is a grid/list of ingested papers.
library.paper_card: Uses card styling. Displays metadata (title, authors, year, chunk count) using the mono font. Includes a 'Remove' button with a trash icon.

chat.layout: Left sidebar (w-64) listing ingested papers and context. Main central area for the chat history. Bottom fixed input area.
chat.input_area: Floating pill or wide bar fixed at bottom, with a text input and send icon button.
chat.message: AI answer displays rendered Markdown, confidence badge (high/med/low), and inline citation pills. Includes a sub-queries expansion panel (agent trace).

answer_detail.layout: A detailed view (could be a full page or a right sidebar panel). Shows the full answer, retrieved chunks in the serif font for deep reading, and the agent replan count / trace.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a premium 'Linear' aesthetic: deep dark grays (#09090B to #18181B), very subtle 1px borders (#27272A), avoiding heavy shadows, gradients, and purely black/white extremes.
Use Next.js 14 App Router layout structure as specified in constraints.
All interactive elements MUST have explicit data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-dropzone', data-testid='chat-input', data-testid='citation-pill').
For citations, use compact inline pill elements that look distinct from regular text, styled with monospace font.
Ensure the chat main reading column is centered and constrained to max-w-3xl for optimal readability.
Use mock data across the application for papers, chat history, agent sub-queries, and confidence scores. No backend wiring is needed.
Build the Answer Detail view (/chat/[id]) such that it can display detailed retrieved chunks with paper attribution, utilizing the Serif font (Newsreader) for the long-form text content.
